untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multiple untranslatable conditions: (1) VIX percentile rank calculation not available—only india_vix level used as proxy; (2) Market breadth indicator (% declining stocks) not in allowed list; (3) Put/Call ratio not in allowed list; (4) Account equity-based position sizing rules (125% of max loss requirement) cannot be expressed in indicator-based rules; (5) Partial exit at +2% with trailing stop and equity-conditional full exit require position management logic beyond condition operators.
translation_notes: Translated core counter-trend reversion signal using available volatility and price action indicators. hvol_20 > 0.80 approximates 80th percentile volatility threshold. india_vix > 80 captures extreme panic. returns < -0.07 captures 7% single-day move. Exit at +2% profit translatable; trailing stop and equity-based exit conditions are not. Market breadth (>70% declining) and Put/Call ratio (>1.2) lack direct equivalents in allowed indicators and should be added as external filters or data sources. Position sizing rules require portfolio management integration outside indicator conditions.
